items.title: A United 787 engine fire underscores the role of swift pilot actions and the dangers on the ground
items.title_en: A United 787 engine fire underscores the role of swift pilot actions and the dangers on the ground
items.title_zh: 美联航787客机引擎起火事件凸显了飞行员迅速采取行动的重要性，同时也揭示了地面存在的危险。
